title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5 通用模型
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
elvis
@omarsar0
NEW: Anthropic introduces Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model for general use.
Beginning of a new class of frontier models.
Claude
@claudeai
11h
Introducing Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.
Its capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available.
00:00
